note: SUGGESTED artifact-type tags + their renderer/template/presentation — the DATA source of truth (spec/methodology-presentation-from-data.md §4). Matched by tag-EQUALITY in the engine; rendered by the UI via the `presentation` blocks here (no value is hardcoded in web.py/prototypes.py). Invent your own type by adding an item — no code change. Renderer templates live under sonaloop/prototype_templates/<template>/index.html and read the concept JSON (screens/elements + optional rich blocks: metrics/cards/columns/lead) plus an optional concept-level `fidelity` (lofi|midfi|hifi) used purely for theming.

items._note: A PRODUCTION-CREDIBLE experience: an interactive model embedded in a multi-screen narrative FLOW with cross-screen state, plus `chart` (sweep an input -> live curves), `verdict` (data-driven conditional text via comparison exprs), and `timeline` elements. The richest hi-fi class. Theme via concept.fidelity (lofi/midfi/hifi).

An INTERACTIVE/computational prototype: range/number inputs feed `computed` + `bar` elements whose `formula` is evaluated live (e.g. a pension-gap or compounding model the persona can actually steer). The spa-model template self-themes from concept.fidelity, so a lofi/midfi/hifi tag styles it without a separate template.
